title: polygala dunniana
intro: Polygala dunniana is a species of flowering plant in the milkwort family, commonly known as the Chinese polygala or yuan zhi, native to southern China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Polygala dunniana include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and enhancing cognitive function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, capsules, and tinctures, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
